z.description: The value of the standard normal random variable for which the cumulative probability P(z < 0.67) is being calculated.

A1.description: The area (probability) between z=0 and z=0.67, looked up from the standard normal table.

A2.description: The area (probability) to the left of z=0, which is 0.5 due to the symmetry of the standard normal distribution.
